items.headline: Using Starlink, American Kelsey Pfendler Broke 4 Records Rowing Solo from California to Hawaii
items.summary: Using Starlink, American Kelsey Pfendler Broke 4 Records Rowing Solo from California to Hawaii  On America’s 250th birthday, Kelsey Pfendler, an American woman and Grand Canyon raft guide, turned an audacious dream into history. During training, she …

items.label: SpaceX
items.headline: SpaceX Trajectory Remains Upward Despite Periodic Setbacks as Company Advances Ambitious Goals
items.summary: SpaceX continues to lead in space exploration with its innovative approaches, overcoming challenges, and expanding global connectivity through Starlink, while maintaining strong partnerships and inspiring future generations.

items.headline: Elon Musk’s Brain-chip Startup Aims for Scalability with New Transdural Procedure
items.summary: Elon Musk’s brain-computer interface (BCI) startup Neuralink announced the company has successfully performed its first transdural brain implant surgery, which promises to increase scalability while significantly reducing surgical trauma. The News In a new vi…
